importantVotes.title: PG&E Easement at Southeast Water Pollution Control Plant
importantVotes.description: Grants PG&E a permanent 2,944-square-foot easement on city-owned land at 1800 Jerrold Avenue to replace and relocate electrical facilities at the Southeast Water Pollution Control Plant. Fielder was the lone no vote.

importantVotes.title: Allied Universal SFMTA Security Contract Extension — $64.9M
importantVotes.description: Extends the SFMTA's armed and unarmed security services contract with Allied Universal by one year through March 2027, increasing the total contract value to nearly $65 million.

importantVotes.title: Settlement — Everen Capital Corporation — $2.19M Tax Refund
importantVotes.description: Settles an unlitigated claim from Everen Capital Corporation for a $2.19 million refund of gross receipts and homelessness gross receipts taxes, one of the larger tax refund settlements the city has paid out.

importantVotes.title: Settlement — Sheriff's Chemical Agent Discharge — $30,450
importantVotes.description: Settles a citation from the Bay Area Air Quality Management District against the SF Sheriff's Office for $30,450 after the Sheriff's Office was cited for discharging chemical agents in what regulators characterized as a public nuisance.

importantVotes.title: Iranian American Heritage Month — March 2026
importantVotes.description: Recognizes March 2026 as Iranian American Heritage Month in San Francisco. The resolution was severed from the consent agenda for a separate vote.
